signals.raw:

signals.headline: Key April Catalysts Identified for Market Recovery | YES | MED** — Analysts highlight multiple triggers: the CLARITY Act
signals.raw: Key April Catalysts Identified for Market Recovery | YES | MED** — Analysts highlight multiple triggers: the CLARITY Act markup scheduled for late April (targeting XRP recovery to $2.50–$4.00)[3], Ethereum's Layer 2 network activity monitoring[4], and potential Fed rate softening if oil-driven inflation stabilizes[4]. signals.headline: March 2026 annual inflation at 2
signals.raw: March 2026 annual inflation at 2.2% (up from 2.0% in Jan/Feb, below 2.4% forecasts), with Feb steady at 2.0% near BoK's 2% target.[2]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: BoK held benchmark rate at 2
signals.raw: BoK held benchmark rate at 2.5% on Apr 10 (7th straight month), citing inflation ~2.2%, oil price risks from Middle East tensions, and weak won (~1,520/USD).[3]

signals.headline: Earlier Jan 2026 inflation cooled to 2
signals.raw:
Earlier Jan 2026 inflation cooled to 2.0% YoY (core steady at 2%), unlikely to prompt rate cuts amid housing/FX concerns.[1]

No confirmations, resolutions, or announcements post-Apr 10 in results; oil shocks and OECD forecast tweaks (growth to 1.7%, inflation to 2.7%) are from Mar and predate today.[4][5][6] **LOW confidence** due to recency gap in sources (latest ~Apr 10).[2][3]
